query:
SELECT c.id, c.customer_name, c.channel, c.channel_user_id, m.content, m.created_at 
FROM conversations c 
JOIN messages m ON m.conversation_id = c.id 
WHERE c.channel = 'line' 
ORDER BY m.created_at DESC 
LIMIT 10;
